steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The critics praised the films as "picture-perfect" and "heartbreaking and inspiring," and fans hope this ______ will draw audiences.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the answer
steps.content:
The blank needs to capture why the collection can "satisfy any art lover" — the passage lists art ranging from monumental sculptures to street art, signaling wide variety. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — controversy over: dispute about — the passage is wholly positive; no conflict is mentioned. ✗
  • Choice B — breadth of: wide range or variety of — matches the diverse examples given and explains why any art lover is satisfied. ✓
  • Choice C — apathy toward: lack of interest in — contradicts the positive framing of "outstanding collection." ✗
  • Choice D — confusion about: uncertainty regarding — implies disorder, not the rich variety described. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
